blocks.heading: Privacy Policy
blocks.body:
**Privacy Policy for Phone Fall**

_Last updated: May 14, 2026_

**Overview**
Phone Fall ("the app") is designed to detect when your phone is dropped. Your privacy is important to us. This policy explains what data the app uses and how it is handled.

**Data We Collect**
The app does not collect, transmit, or share any personal data. All data stays on your device.

**Motion & Sensor Data**
The app uses your device's accelerometer to detect drop events. This data is processed entirely on-device and is never transmitted to any server or third party.

**Fall History**
Records of detected drop events (time, intensity) are stored locally on your device using Apple's on-device storage. This data never leaves your device.

**In-App Purchases**
Purchases are processed entirely by Apple through the App Store. The app does not handle or store any payment information.

**Third-Party Services**
The app does not use any analytics, advertising, or third-party SDKs.

**Children's Privacy**
The app does not knowingly collect data from anyone, including children.

**Contact**
Questions? Contact us at: [https://github.com/twilightscapes/PhoneFall](vscode-file://vscode-app/Applications/Visual%20Studio%20Code.app/Contents/Resources/app/out/vs/code/electron-browser/workbench/workbench.html)
